title: Release 1.15.2
body:
… containing only an update of c/image, to fix #2346 .

@TomSweeneyRedHat entirely up to you — should we release this as is, or do a more complete / more coordinated vendor dance?

comments.body: Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.
i need to move the packit config from main to this branch. But LGTM.

@mtrmac if you don't mind, can we rebase this on https://github.com/containers/skopeo/pull/2369 ? That will allow centos 10 stream package update via packit cli command instead of a manual update by @jnovy .
@lsm5 Done. Thanks for updating this so quickly!
